title: Report Structure Graph (RSG)
description: A format-neutral ordered tree inferred from a template report. Every non-static node carries a format-native stable anchor, an inferred semantic role, a confidence score, a rebind class, and a provenance record that includes the source reporting period. The RSG is an addressing-and-verification structure, NEVER a generator.

schema_version.description: Semver of this RSG schema. A change serializes and re-triggers the Bet-1 smoke across both output formats.

format.description: Native output format the template was parsed from. HTML and Office are the ONLY output formats. Power BI is an input source, never an output format.

template_id.description: Stable identity of the source template (used to reuse a prior Binding Manifest for recurring templates).

id.description: Stable node identity, unique within the tree. Never a raw character offset.

role.description: Inferred semantic role of the node.

confidence.description: Classifier confidence in role+class. Below the calibrated threshold the node is QA-flagged for human review regardless of value content.

data_shaped_literal.description: Output of the pinned, non-inference, deterministic data-shaped-literal detector (currency/number/date/percent/unit/known-entity). If true, the node CANNOT be 'frozen' and is force-demoted to 'needs-review' regardless of classifier confidence.

children.description: Ordered child nodes. Order is load-bearing (document order); V3 isomorphism and V2 diff depend on it.

allOf.description: Earned-frozen invariant: a node bearing a data-shaped literal may never be class 'frozen'.

anchor.description: Format-native STABLE node identity, re-resolvable after each mutation. Never a raw char-offset.

kind.description: json_pointer/element_id/css_selector for HTML; ooxml_path (w:body walk path) for Office.

nodeClass.description: frozen = EARNED data-free chrome (byte-identical in output); surgical = byte-edit a value at the anchor under the zero-literal construction rule; regenerate = rebuilt from new data (rasters and embedded-data-cache nodes are FORCED here); needs-review = cannot ship without human sign-off (default for any data-shaped literal in a candidate-frozen node, or sub-threshold confidence).

method.description: native-parse (zero ML, exact syntax anchors) and rule-based are inference-independent; llm-labeled is inference-adjacent and QA-flagged below threshold.

source.description: Origin artifact/dataset this node's content traces to.

source_period.description: Reporting period the value belongs to (e.g. 'Q4 2024'). Required for every value node so the period-coherence leg can assert the label matches the value's period. null only for period-agnostic static chrome.

pbi_route.description: For Power-BI-sourced nodes only: the ingestion route. xmla/rest = data-read; screenshot = fresh-captured image (always class 'regenerate'). null for non-PBI nodes.
